title: pedicularis longiflora var. tubiformis
intro: Pedicularis longiflora var. tubiformis, also known as the Long-flowered Pedicularis, is a plant species in the bumblebee botanical genus Pedicularis. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a decoction or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
